prompt_used: This is Villain. A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next. Work the case in order: secure voicemail waveform anomaly, confirm the scene at gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels, and do not let The Quartermaster choose the pace. Trust the evidence before you trust the performance.
source_prompt: Story: Midnight Lockbox (midnight-lockbox) | Hook: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels | Villain: The Quartermaster | Villain worldview: Storage is memory, and memory belongs to whoever controls access. | Motifs: unit tags, bolt cutters, time-lock stickers. Create villain voice profile for The Quartermaster. Worldview: Storage is memory, and memory belongs to whoever controls access.. Manner: Dry, managerial contempt..
